welcome.tagline: Tend to the moments, keep the Flame.
welcome.description: Stoke curiosity. Keep the spark alive.

signUp.title: Create your account

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: We sent you a link to reset your password.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.hint: Your partner sees this with every answer.
name.saveFailedBody: Check your connection and try again.

acceptInvite.title: Join your partner
acceptInvite.subtitle: Enter the code they sent you.
acceptInvite.invalidCodeBody: This code isn't valid or has expired. Ask your partner for a new one.

errors.alreadyPairedBody: Your account is already linked to a partner. Disconnect first in Profile, then try again.
errors.expiredBody: This invite code has expired. Ask your partner to create a new one.
errors.usedBody: This invite code has already been accepted.
errors.ownCodeBody: This is your invite code. Share it with your partner instead.

firstPrompt.title: Here's how it works
firstPrompt.samplePrompt: What's one thing {partner} did this week that made your day better?
firstPrompt.explanation: Each day, you both answer privately. Then you see each other's response.
firstPrompt.sampleResponse: When you made coffee before I asked. I noticed, even if I didn't say anything.

invitePartner.title: Invite your partner
invitePartner.subtitle: Stoke works best together. Send this to your partner.
invitePartner.subtitleCreate: Stoke works best together. Create an invite to send to your partner.
invitePartner.waitForThem: I'll wait for them to join
invitePartner.createErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.
invitePartner.shareFailedBody: You can copy the code instead.
invitePartner.skipErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.
invitePartner.verifyNotice: Verify your email when you can — we sent you a link.

toneCalibration.title: How are you two doing?
toneCalibration.subtitle: This helps us start in the right place.
toneCalibration.solidDescription: Just want to stay that way
toneCalibration.okayDescription: But feel a bit distant lately
toneCalibration.saveErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.

ready.title: You're all set

One thoughtful question, answered together.

today.keptForCouch: Kept for the couch — it's in the Hearth.

notePlaceholders.communication: What conversation is behind that number?
notePlaceholders.intimacy: One moment behind that number, if you want.

today.notifyWhenAnswered: We'll let you know when they answer
today.savedOffline: Saved on this phone — it'll send when you're back online.
today.unpairedBody: Daily questions unlock when your partner joins.
today.notifBody: We'll only nudge when it matters — when {{name}} answers, and when a new question is ready.
today.partnerSetAside: {{name}} set this one aside for today — it'll keep. Your answer is saved.

memories.title: Memories
memories.noCompletionsSubtitle: Complete a prompt together to see it here.
memories.emptySavedTitle: Your saved memories will appear here.
memories.emptySavedSubtitle: Each week, pick your favorite moment to save.

insights.title: Insights
insights.emptySubtitle: Complete a few prompts together and your relationship insights will appear here.
insights.completeMore: Complete more prompts to see your emotional journey.
insights.earnMilestones: Complete prompts together to earn milestones.

settings.title: Profile
settings.exportDataSubtitle: A copy of everything you've written
settings.anonymizeSubtitle: Permanently removes your words. Cannot be undone.
settings.signOutConfirm: You can sign back in anytime.
settings.frequencySubtitle: How often should you receive prompts?
settings.deleteBody:
Your account will be deactivated immediately and your data permanently removed after 30 days. Your partner will be notified.

This cannot be undone.
settings.anonymizeBody:
This permanently replaces everything you've written with [removed]. Your words cannot be recovered. Your partner's responses will not be affected.

This cannot be undone.
settings.exportUnavailable: Data export is available once every 24 hours.
settings.exportFailed: Couldn't export your data. Please try again.
settings.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.
settings.anonymizeFailed: Couldn't anonymize your responses. Please try again.
settings.contactFailed: Couldn't open your mail app. You can email us at {{email}}.
settings.safetyText: Stoke is not therapy or crisis support. If you feel unsafe in your relationship, please seek help.
settings.errorUpdateFrequency: Couldn't update your prompt frequency. Please try again.
settings.subscriptionWarningBody: Deleting your account will not cancel your subscription. You will continue to be charged unless you cancel it first.

reauth.title: Confirm your identity
reauth.subtitle: For your security, please verify your identity before deleting your account.

paywall.title: Stoke Premium

features.daily: A new question for the two of you, every day
features.followUps: Follow-ups that go deeper when it matters
features.categories: Twelve areas of your relationship, covered

resources.title: Resources
resources.intro: Stoke is not therapy. These resources can help if you want to go deeper.
resources.safetyFooter: If you feel unsafe in your relationship, please reach out for help. You are not alone.

chat.deleteConfirm: This message will be removed for both of you.

offline.banner: You're offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.

explore.title: Categories
explore.sealedLine: Your answer is sealed until they respond.
explore.emptyCategory: No questions here yet — more are on the way.
explore.loadError: These prompts didn't load. Check your connection and try again.
explore.linkFirst: Link with your partner first — questions are answered together.
explore.startErrorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.
explore.saveErrorBody: Please check your connection and try again.

dateNights.title: Date Nights
dateNights.planned: Planned. Your partner will see it too.

home.pulseStreakOnFire: {{count}}-day streak. You two are on fire.
home.pulseBothResponded: Both responded today. Another moment shared.
home.pulseDefault: A small moment today can mean a lot.

checkIn.title: Quick check-in
checkIn.privacy: Private — only you can see your answers

hearth.title: Hearth
hearth.subSteady: Nothing waiting — your fire is steady
hearth.empty: Your first answered question will glow here.

talkSheet.starterDivergence: You two see this one differently — that's information, not a problem. Each of you: what might the other be seeing that you don't?
talkSheet.starterRepair: What does the hard part look like from where you sit? Not the fix yet — just the view.
talkSheet.starterFlagged: One of you kept this one for the couch. Start with the number: what would move it one point higher?
talkSheet.starterHint: Read it out loud. No screens after this line.
talkSheet.partnerMarkedFirst: {{name}} marked it — were you two able to talk?
talkSheet.settleBody: Tended. This ember settles into your hearth.

gates.followUpLine: Follow-ups are part of Stoke Premium
gates.hearthTitle: Your full history lives in Premium
gates.hearthBody: This month glows right here, couch and all. Past months and your trends are kept for you in Premium.
